title: maxillaria patens
intro: Maxillaria patens, also known as the "Yellow Vanda Orchid", is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Maxillaria patens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from fever and sore throats. Maxillaria patens can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory conditions.
